title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.310 - May require officers to exhibit accounts
text:
77.310.  May require officers to exhibit accounts. — The mayor shall have power to require, as often as he may deem it necessary, any officer of the city to exhibit his accounts or other papers or records, and to make report to the council, in writing, touching any subject or matter pertaining to his office.
(RSMo 1939 § 6874) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6728; 1919 § 8215; 1909 § 9152
